chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1460 of 2025 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.2316/2025 2.For hearing of main case. 23.04.2025 Mr.Muhammad Adeel Awan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for the Respondent. Mr.Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Tariq Aziz, Assistant Collector SAPT and Mr.Shakeel Ahmed, Second Secretary, Facilitation Mechanism are present. On the last date following order was passed: “18-04-2025 Mr. Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Tariq Aziz, Assistant Collector Customs. Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate files power on behalf of respondents No.2, 3 and 4 and statements on behalf of respondents No.3 and 4, which are taken on record. He submits under instructions that 8 GDs are referred in paragraph 2 of the memorandum of petition and of the same, the GDs at serial 1, 2, 3, 6, 7 and 8 have been de-blocked. He states that the petitioner’s grievance to such extent stands ameliorated, however, insofar as GDs referred at serial 4 and 5 are concerned, they are blocked by Collector of Customs (Facilitation Mechanism), Customs House, Karachi. He states that the same may be impleaded and issued notice to so as to proceed further with the petition. Learned counsel for the petitioner makes oral motion under Order I Rule 10 CPC in such regard and the same is granted. Collector of Customs (Facilitation Mechanism), Customs House, Karachi is hereby impleaded as respondent No.6.

Learned counsel for the petitioner makes oral motion under Order I Rule 10 CPC in such regard and the same is granted. Collector of Customs (Facilitation Mechanism), Customs House, Karachi is hereby impleaded as respondent No.6. Learned counsel for the petitioner may file amended title whereafter notice may be issued to the newly impleaded respondent for 23.04.2025. The newly impleaded respondent is directed to ensure that the responsible officer conversant with the facts is available in Court to assist on the next date.” Today, Mr.Khalid Rajpar, Advocate is present along with Mr.Tariq Aziz, Assistant Collector SAPT and Mr.Shakeel Ahmed, Second Secretary, Facilitation Mechanism. He has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.6, which is taken on record. He states that remaining two J.Ds also stand de-blocked. In view of such statement, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition, hence, the same is disposed of. The presence and assistance of learned officers is appreciated. Judge Judge nasir
